headline: UBS Maintains Buy on McKesson, Lowers Price Target to $1000
summary: UBS  analyst Kevin Caliendo   maintains McKesson (NYSE:MCK) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $1012 to $1000.

headline: What McKesson (MCK)'s Dividend Declaration and Q4 Earnings Prep Means For Shareholders
summary: McKesson’s board recently declared a regular dividend of US$0.82 per share, payable on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 1, 2026, while the company is also preparing to report its fourth-quarter 2026 earnings on May 7. This combination of a confirmed cash return and an upcoming earnings release, against a backdrop of strong multi-year operational execution, is focusing investor attention on how durable McKesson’s business model may be. headline: McKesson Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: IRVING, Texas, April 22, 2026--The Board of Directors of McKesson Corporation (NYSE:MCK) yesterday declared a regular dividend of 82 cents per share of common stock. The dividend will be payable on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 1, 2026.
